name: term_key
description: The string that appears in instance data and identifies this vocabulary entry. Unified key field across Term, LifecycleState, and RelationTypeDefinition.

aiGuidance.purpose: The canonical key string for this vocabulary entry — the value stored in Note.tags, Relation.relationType, Record.lifecycleState, or a select field value.
aiGuidance.extraction: Use the exact key string as it appears in usage — typically lowercase, kebab-case for tags and relation types.
